title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: A beginner tutorial demonstrating how to build an agentic AI application using Claude Code across three interfaces: desktop app, terminal CLI, and VS Code integration. The tutorial covers installing Claude Code, setting up the Anthropic API, and creating an AI Resume & Cover Letter Generator with features including personalized resume generation and skill recommendations.
